title: lathyrus niger var. heterophyllus
intro: Lathyrus niger var. heterophyllus, also known as the vetchling or black pea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus niger var. heterophyllus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to treat various health conditions, including cardiovascular and digestive issues.
